'''romasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xanthospermous|xanthospermous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xanthospermous|xanthospermous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| romasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:romasithi|romasithi]] || [[word:romasiji|romasiji]] || [[word:romasishi|romasishi]] || [[word:romasiki|romasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:romasuthuthu|romasuthuthu]] || [[word:romasujuju|romasujuju]] || [[word:romasushushu|romasushushu]] || [[word:romasukuku|romasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:romasuthu|romasuthu]] || [[word:romasuju|romasuju]] || [[word:romasushu|romasushu]] || [[word:romasuku|romasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:romasufthuf|romasufthuf]] || [[word:romasufjuf|romasufjuf]] || [[word:romasufshuf|romasufshuf]] || [[word:romasufkuf|romasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:romasethe|romasethe]] || [[word:romaseje|romaseje]] || [[word:romaseshe|romaseshe]] || [[word:romaseke|romaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:romasothotho|romasothotho]] || [[word:romasojojo|romasojojo]] || [[word:romasoshosho|romasoshosho]] || [[word:romasokoko|romasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:romasotho|romasotho]] || [[word:romasojo|romasojo]] || [[word:romasosho|romasosho]] || [[word:romasoko|romasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:romasofthof|romasofthof]] || [[word:romasofjof|romasofjof]] || [[word:romasofshof|romasofshof]] || [[word:romasofkof|romasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:romasÃŸfthÃŸf|romasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfjÃŸf|romasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfshÃŸf|romasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfkÃŸf|romasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:romasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|romasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|romasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|romasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|romasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:romasÃŸfthÃŸf|romasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfjÃŸf|romasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfshÃŸf|romasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfkÃŸf|romasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:romasÃŸfthÃŸf|romasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfjÃŸf|romasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfshÃŸf|romasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:romasÃŸfkÃŸf|romasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:romasÃḊthÃḊ|romasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:romasÃḊjÃḊ|romasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:romasÃḊshÃḊ|romasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:romasÃḊkÃḊ|romasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:romasathatha|romasathatha]] || [[word:romasajaja|romasajaja]] || [[word:romasashasha|romasashasha]] || [[word:romasakaka|romasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:romasatha|romasatha]] || [[word:romasaja|romasaja]] || [[word:romasasha|romasasha]] || [[word:romasaka|romasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:romasafthaf|romasafthaf]] || [[word:romasafjaf|romasafjaf]] || [[word:romasafshaf|romasafshaf]] || [[word:romasafkaf|romasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:romasasha|romasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:romasshÃḋasha|romasshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:romasroasha|romasroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:romasmuasha|romasmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:romasyaasha|romasyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goromasnkshÃḋasha|goromasnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goromasnkroasha|goromasnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goromasnkmuasha|goromasnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goromasnkyaasha|goromasnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:romamasasha|romamasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:romamasshÃḋasha|romamasshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:romamasroasha|romamasroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:romamasmuasha|romamasmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:romamasyaasha|romamasyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goromamasnkshÃḋasha|goromamasnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goromamasnkroasha|goromamasnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goromamasnkmuasha|goromamasnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goromamasnkyaasha|goromamasnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:remÃḊsasha|remÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:remÃḊsshÃḋasha|remÃḊsshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:remÃḊsroasha|remÃḊsroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:remÃḊsmuasha|remÃḊsmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:remÃḊsyaasha|remÃḊsyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goremÃḊsnkshÃḋasha|goremÃḊsnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goremÃḊsnkroasha|goremÃḊsnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goremÃḊsnkmuasha|goremÃḊsnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goremÃḊsnkyaasha|goremÃḊsnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:romfasasha|romfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:romfasshÃḋasha|romfasshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:romfasroasha|romfasroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:romfasmuasha|romfasmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:romfasyaasha|romfasyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goromfasnkshÃḋasha|goromfasnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goromfasnkroasha|goromfasnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goromfasnkmuasha|goromfasnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goromfasnkyaasha|goromfasnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
